name: ctox-rxdb-js
product_rule: CTOX Business OS is the source of truth; upstream RxDB compatibility is secondary to CTOX protocol, reconnect, diagnostics, and file-sync guarantees.

publish_policy.release_identity: bundle provenance, bundle hash, lockfile hash, and Git tag
publish_policy.distribution: Business OS browser bundle with provenance, not a public upstream-compatible npm package

browser_bundle.source_of_truth: fork source, not hand-edited generated bundle
